case_title: MARLON SOLIS VS. JOSE LISARDI GUEVARA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLIS, MARLON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUEVARA, JOSE LISARDI , AN INDIVIDUAL $1,378.28 PRINCIPAL, $20.17 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,578.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLIS, MARLON AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, JOSE LISARDI , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 18115021) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLIS, MARLON AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, JOSE LISARDI , AN INDIVIDUAL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
